prerequisites.value: Bardic knowledge class ability or Knowledge domain, Knowledge (any two) 3 ranks each.

description.value: **Benefit:** You can use your knowledge to demoralize an enemy. When you use a standard action to Intimidate a creature with a base CR of 2 or greater, you can use a Knowledge skill that could be used to identify the creatureâs type in place of Intimidate when attempting to demoralize that creature. The target creature must be intelligent and understand the language that you are using when conveying the disconcerting knowledge.
